label: Mental state
description: Defines a mental state that a pawn can enter, including its eligibility rules, recovery conditions, interaction blocks, drug policy, and display properties.

stateClass.label: State class
stateClass.description: C# MentalState subclass that implements the active behaviour for this mental state.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# MentalStateWorker subclass that decides when this mental state can trigger.

category.label: Category
category.description: Broad behavioural category of this mental state. Aggro means the pawn attacks others; Malicious means hostile but not directly violent; Misc covers the rest.

prisonersCanDo.label: Prisoners can do
prisonersCanDo.description: Whether prisoner pawns are eligible to enter this mental state.

slavesCanDo.label: Slaves can do
slavesCanDo.description: Whether slave pawns are eligible to enter this mental state.

inCaravanCanDo.label: In caravan can do
inCaravanCanDo.description: Whether pawns travelling in a caravan are eligible to enter this mental state.

colonistsOnly.label: Colonists only
colonistsOnly.description: If true, only colonist pawns can enter this mental state.

slavesOnly.label: Slaves only
slavesOnly.description: If true, only slave pawns can enter this mental state.

requiredCapacities.label: Required capacities
requiredCapacities.description: PawnCapacityDefs that a pawn must have at non-zero level to be eligible for this mental state.

downedCanDo.label: Downed can do
downedCanDo.description: Whether a downed pawn can enter this mental state.

unspawnedNotInCaravanCanDo.label: Unspawned not in caravan can do
unspawnedNotInCaravanCanDo.description: Whether an unspawned pawn that is not in a caravan (e.g. held captive off-map) can enter this mental state.

blockNormalThoughts.label: Block normal thoughts
blockNormalThoughts.description: If true, the pawn does not accumulate normal mood thoughts while in this mental state.

stopsJobs.label: Stops jobs
stopsJobs.description: If true, the pawn's current job is interrupted when this mental state begins.

blockInteractionInitiationExcept.label: Block interaction initiation except
blockInteractionInitiationExcept.description: If set, the pawn may only initiate interactions that appear in this list. An empty element blocks all initiations.

blockInteractionRecipientExcept.label: Block interaction recipient except
blockInteractionRecipientExcept.description: If set, the pawn may only receive interactions that appear in this list. An empty element blocks all received interactions.

blockRandomInteraction.label: Block random interaction
blockRandomInteraction.description: If true, the pawn does not initiate random social interactions while in this mental state.

stateEffecter.label: State effecter
stateEffecter.description: EffecterDef played on the pawn while this mental state is active.

tale.label: Tale
tale.description: TaleDef recorded when this mental state ends, used for art generation and history.

allowBeatfire.label: Allow beat fire
allowBeatfire.description: Whether the pawn is allowed to beat out fires while in this mental state.

drugCategory.label: Drug category
drugCategory.description: Which category of drugs the pawn will binge on during this mental state. Only relevant for binging mental states.

ignoreDrugPolicy.label: Ignore drug policy
ignoreDrugPolicy.description: If true, the pawn ignores the colony drug policy when consuming drugs during this mental state.

ticksBetweenRamblingRange.label: Ticks between rambling range
ticksBetweenRamblingRange.description: Random range of ticks between rambling speech events during this mental state, e.g. 600~1800.

recoveryMtbDays.label: Recovery MTB days
recoveryMtbDays.description: Mean time in in-game days before spontaneous recovery. Use Infinity to disable spontaneous recovery.

minTicksBeforeRecovery.label: Min ticks before recovery
minTicksBeforeRecovery.description: Minimum ticks that must pass after this mental state begins before recovery can occur.

maxTicksBeforeRecovery.label: Max ticks before recovery
maxTicksBeforeRecovery.description: Hard tick cap after which the mental state always ends, regardless of other conditions.

recoverFromSleep.label: Recover from sleep
recoverFromSleep.description: If true, the pawn recovers from this mental state when they fall asleep.

recoverFromDowned.label: Recover from downed
recoverFromDowned.description: If true, the pawn recovers from this mental state when they become downed.

recoverFromCaptured.label: Recover from captured
recoverFromCaptured.description: If true, the pawn recovers from this mental state when they are captured.

recoverFromCollapsingExhausted.label: Recover from collapsing exhausted
recoverFromCollapsingExhausted.description: If true, the pawn recovers from this mental state when they collapse from exhaustion.

moodRecoveryThought.label: Mood recovery thought
moodRecoveryThought.description: ThoughtDef applied to the pawn when they recover from this mental state.

allowGuilty.label: Allow guilty
allowGuilty.description: If false, the pawn cannot gain the guilty thought during this mental state.

beginLetter.label: Begin letter
beginLetter.description: Translated text body of the letter sent to the player when this mental state begins.

beginLetterLabel.label: Begin letter label
beginLetterLabel.description: Translated headline of the letter sent to the player when this mental state begins.

beginLetterDef.label: Begin letter def
beginLetterDef.description: LetterDef controlling the visual style and sound of the begin letter. Defaults to NegativeEvent.

nameColor.label: Name color
nameColor.description: Color used when displaying the pawn's name or status while in this mental state. Defaults to green.

recoveryMessage.label: Recovery message
recoveryMessage.description: Translated message shown in the log when the pawn recovers from this mental state. May be IsNull.

baseInspectLine.label: Base inspect line
baseInspectLine.description: Translated line shown in the inspect pane while the pawn is in this mental state.

escapingPrisonersIgnore.label: Escaping prisoners ignore
escapingPrisonersIgnore.description: If true, escaping prisoners do not treat pawns in this mental state as a threat.

blocksDefendAndExpandHive.label: Blocks defend and expand hive
blocksDefendAndExpandHive.description: If true, insectoid hive AI is suppressed while a pawn in this mental state is nearby.

basic-mental-state.label: Basic mental state
basic-mental-state.description: Minimal mental state with a state class and inspect line.

aggro-mental-state.label: Aggro mental state
aggro-mental-state.description: Mental state where the pawn attacks others, with a begin letter and name color.
